name: aipany
description: Aipany 级联实时语音网关：千问实时 ASR + OpenAI 兼容 LLM + 千问实时 TTS

scripts.build: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run build
scripts.dev: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run dev
scripts.test: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run typecheck
